item.title: Angel Takahashi - Care Provider
item.dc:creator: crodesign
item.content:encoded: Elite CareFinders, I highly recommend this agency to all health care providers. My experience with Mrs. Rose, she help me from the start to finish, and beyond. She is very compassionate and her dedication to help our Kupuna and providers / caregiver like my self. In terms of placing our Kupuna, she treat them as her own family. She make sure anything and everything that needs to be done is all meet. She is very approachable and understanding. If you have an open bed, or looking for a placement for your love ones or our Kupuna, pls. I highly recommend Rose at Elite CareFinders. You will find a place called home. Care Provider.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Elite CareFinders, I highly recommend this agency to all health care providers. My experience with Mrs. Rose, she help me from the start to finish, and beyond. She is very compassionate and her dedication to help our Kupuna and providers / caregiver like my self. In terms of placing our Kupuna, she treat them as her own family. She make sure anything and everything that needs to be done is all meet. She is very approachable and understanding. If you have an open bed, or looking for a placement for your love ones or our Kupuna, pls. I highly recommend Rose at Elite CareFinders. You will find a place called home.

item.title: Sandra Y. Tengan
item.dc:creator: crodesign
item.content:encoded:
Rose went above and beyond, true to their ELITE STANDARDS in searching and placing my mother in a very nice Foster Care home. Rose is tremendously caring, compassionate, and hard working. Her years in professional experience as RN, health insurance, case management have accumulated into a very efficient & successful practice. Rose Gallego is the best in her field.
I can confidently refer my friends and associates to Elite Carefinders.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Rose went above and beyond, true to their ELITE STANDARDS in searching and placing my mother in a very nice Foster Care home. Rose is tremendously caring, compassionate, and hard working. Her years in professional experience as RN, health insurance, case management have accumulated into a very efficient & successful practice. Rose Gallego is the best in her field.
I can confidently refer my friends and associates to Elite Carefinders.

Rose came to assess my soso, huhum care home and transformed it to an absolutely beautiful and enticing home to place your love ones in. I will confidently refer Rose to other caregivers and/or family members who are looking for competent, caring and deeply involved service provider like Rose. Kudos to Elite Care Finders.

Mahalo, rose, I only have the highest praise for you, you helped me manage the stressful placement of aging parents, offering detailed options with photos, solutions to match finite financial resources, and present alternatives to consider when I didn't know the right question to ask. My parents are unable to fully appreciate and express your hours of effort, but I do. karma will bless you. Mahalo,

Many Thank You's to Rose for helping our family in navigating the process of finding a home for our Aunty G. It was a stressful time and with Rose's experience she helped to alleviate the stress and put our minds at ease. We appreciate your services Rose and would definitely recommend your services

It's not an easy decision to place your loved one in a care home but with Elite Carefinders we found just the right place for our mother. Rose Gallego from Elite CareFinders does all the research for you and guides you throughout the entire process. I appreciated the fact that she is a RN, with experience and knowledge in long term care, insurance and regulatory requirements. Rose evaluates the homes she recommends for quality and she offers snapshots of the available homes for you to view on her website! Rose offers a personal touch to her service and went beyond the call of duty to assure that both my mom and the family were kept informed and supported. Her patience, compassion, and engaging personality made it easy for us to work with her. I would highly recommend EliteCareFinders to anyone who is in need of finding a home for their loved one. Thank you Rose!

Rose was nothing but PHENOMENAL! She is the definition of going "above and beyond"! It is never an easy decision to place a loved family member into a care home. Yet, Rose made the decision much easier. She went to EVERY single home to see if it was a right fit for our mom. She texted us EVERY day to check up on mom when she ended up in the hospital, unexpectedly. Honestly, she is a friend that I didn't think I would've made on this journey. She is a Godsend and a blessing! Would recommend 1000000x over and over again!! Thank you so much for all you've done for me and my family, Rose. We appreciate you to the moon and back! ❤️

I don’t know where to begin to start expressing my gratitude & appreciation in what Elite Carefinders has done for my brother & I in finding the perfect carehome for our Mom! 🙏🏽🙏🏽 Rose is just absolutely AMAZING, GENUINE & has a heart full of love! I’ve dealt with 2 previous Case Management businesses prior and Elite CareFinder is just stellar in the service provided. Rose & Mila went above & beyond for us & they didn’t even know, or did they meet us until my mom moved into the carehome! Thank you Rose! May Jesus truly bless you for being so kind & caring!

From the very start when I first contacted Rose, she was very helpful and professional. She gave us nothing but positive feedback and assurance that we needed to hear. She gave us references of Care Givers to meet with and they were all that she had said. Rose sent us text and emails after working hours and it seemed as if she didn’t stop until our mom’s needs was fulfilled. We did find a caring home for our mom and we want to say a big Mahalo to Rose!

My good fortune was to find Rose, of Elite CareFinders a caring nurse that made our journey to find a place for my wife a success story. Her experience and knowledge of what was needed and when, myriad of obstacles which we overcame. She kept us in touch of all goings on that I felt comfortable having her looking out for wife's welfare. Thank you Rose for being a friend and making my wife very happy to be at a new Home. Aloha

Please all credit go out to Rose Gallego. She led our family and put in special service to the search for a special caring home for my brother. Don’t know what we would have done without her help. Thank you Rose very much for getting the right home, caregiver and case manager. Much Mahalo Elite CareFinder.
Rose was a god sent, her knowledge was invaluable and saved me much time and effort trying to place my mom, she was an angel throughout the process.

Elite Carefinders was so helpful in helping to place our mother with dementia for respite care. Rose helped us find possible facilities and stayed in touch constantly. She answered all our questions and helped us meet all the required preparations. Rose met us with a beautiful care package for our mother when she checked in. We felt like we were in good hands and guided along the way from the start. Highly recommended! Thank you Elite Carefinders!

I canʻt sing Roseʻs praises loudly enough! My search for a care home had become frustrating . I just wasnʻt finding a good fit for my dear 99 year old friend and time was running short. Then someone suggested calling Elite Care Finders. Rose was professional, caring and she listened carefully to my criteria and my friendʻs needs. Within 24 hours she had some suggestions one of which was perfect. Rose was on top of everything all the time. The assessment was done quickly, the agreement signed,the Case Manager hired, and she followed through with the rehab facility to be sure all the discharge needs were completed, meds ordered, equipment in place. I was kept informed of each step along the way and she came to the Care Home on day of admission to be sure all went smoothly. I highly recommend Elite CareFinders to those looking for a quality care home and a smooth transition for a loved one.

Elite CareFinders NO KA'OI! Found a care facility for mom and dad in Honolulu. Many words to describe my experience with EC: No frills, prompt, working for you, compassionate, personal service, dedicated to mission, kept informed, professional, presented multiple options to fit area of need, and more. Highly recommended.

GRATITUDE!!! Rose, lived up to the name of her company.”Elite” care…. That was definitely the type of service she provided. My journey with her started when I had already been looking for a care home for my friend(Ward) that has special needs. No care home would take her. I was referred to her from a facility who said they really didn’t take clients in with this particular needs. I had a deadline and my time was running out. Although desperate to find something, I still wanted the best. So I called Rose, a bit hesitant and prepared to be turned away once again. But, to my surprise Rose said she was up to the challenge! She even gave me options! I was pleasantly surprised. She helped find the perfect match of a care home with all the needs crossed off my list and more. She was there from the beginning, everything in between all the way to the finish line. She helped along with all the paperwork and set up the zoom meetings, interviews etc… To see the smile and joy radiating from my friend when she arrived at her new home was absolutely beautiful, perfect, amazing and such a relief. I am so incredibly grateful, and thankful that she has such a heart for what she does. I would recommend her services to everyone! Rose is so pleasant to work with. Such a gem!

Rose was great getting me information needed to get the process started. We didn't know what to do to find care for mom, but Rose came to the scene, she had a wealth of knowledge on care homes, the people who offer care, and the cost, rules, and options out there. Rose never let a day go by without reaching out to me to make sure we find a good match for moms care. All referenced care homes were great and each care giver had over 10 years experience in home care. Rose made selecting a care giver very difficult as they were all capable and caring homes and families. I felt at home when I met each care giver and their families making the selection difficult. Rose walked us through the process from start to finish, always letting us know about the options and cost along the way. She responds to any request for information or questions the same day, most times within 30 minutes or less. Rose was "on it" from the beginning staying in constant contact, but gave me the choices to be made for moms care. My wife U'ilani, myself, and my mother all appreciate Rose's help and how she made the transition as simple as possible in these stressful times for our family. Rose was in contact with the Kahuku hospital, Adult Care Services, and her contacts and help set everything up to get mom into a care home. Rose met us at the care home when we brought mom from kahuku to Lyma's home. She greeted mom with flowers and cookies, had flowers for my wife, got me a lei and cookies, and even flowers for the care giver. She's a sweetheart for sure. Should the need arise for long term care in the future, I can confidently say that I would choose Rose again. I can recommend Rose & Elite Care Finders for anyone who has the need. Thanks, Ron.

Our family will be forever grateful for the exceptional and professional services Elite Care Finders provided.
Rose went above and beyond her call of duty - her concierge services, wealth of knowledge, positive attitude, and bull dog approach of being an advocate for Dad and the family tremendously helped our family navigate through the rigorous process. Rose not only placed Dad in a Care Home where he can continue to heal and receive the level of care he needed, but the journey to get us there is where our family was most grateful and impressed. Rose always took the time to spend countless hours educating us over the phone, her personalized tours that ensured we were comfortable with the caregivers and their home, her healthcare network and knowing Dads Doctors, her ability to sympathize and empathize with us to relieve our anxiety and stress, and her follow up and visitation after placement shows how much she truly cares. Not sure how she did all of this for our family and found quality time for her other clients…
Thank you Rose for helping us through the process and getting our family out of a dark place - you are a true Mother Theresa!
~ Mike, Dulce, and Mom ~

Kudos to Rose! I am extremely grateful for her hard work and exceptional expertise in helping me place my father in the perfect care home. She navigated the system and presented me with appropriate choices in an easily understandable fashion. She took into account personal preferences and even family dynamics.
I never learned any of this stuff during my medical training. She educated me during the process.
I highly recommend Rose and her group for any placement issues.

We reached out to Rose at a particularly difficult time. Mom was wrongfully discharged by her nursing home shortly before Christmas which sent the family to utter distress and chaos. Rose was kind, caring, patient, experienced, smart and resourceful. She guided us through this most difficult time and was compassionate and extremely helpful througout. We are grateful for her being there for us.

Rose was a life saver! On a holiday weekend at the last minute Kahuku Medical Center (after telling me my Mom with dementia would be in rehab for her broken pelvis) told me to Medicare won’t cover it, they made a mistake and we have to pay $1900 day. Rose acted quickly going through a number of care home and found great place for my Mom. I am extremely grateful for her hard work and exceptional experience. I would highly recommend Rose.

Rose G. RN Senior Care Advisor of Elite CareFinders found a foster care home for my bed ridden husband in the nearby area where I live within a day. She is highly professional and has well-established net working relationship with all Health providers. All paper works are processed by her smoothly. My husband was taken in the foster care Home immediately and wholeheartedly. Thank you, Rose.

I highly recommend Elite CareFinders. I needed to find dad a care home quickly and did not know where to start. Rose was so helpful and knowledgeable. She recommended a few great homes and worked so quickly. We were able to find dad a place in about a week's time. He is happy with his home and caregiver. Thank you Rose!

Rose is amazing, she went above and beyond what is expected when finding the right home for your elderly. What makes Rose different from others is her contacts/relationships in the medical field and also expertise being a former nurse herself. Highly recommended!

Many thanks to Rose for helping me find the perfect Care Home for my friend. She guided me through the process while directly communicating with doctors and Social Worker which helped tremendously in completing required paper work needed for placement. She shared her knowledge and expertise in a way that was easy for me to understand. She provided me with photos and phone numbers of different homes so I could narrow my search and reach out for visits. Her positive attitude and willingness to help made it easier to get through this difficult time in placing a loved one in a Care Home. I would highly recommend Elite Care Finders because I found them to be excellent!

Kaiser placed my Uncle on Hospice in July. I live on the mainland and traveled to help him navigate his care through Hospice and to help him to move from his retirement center to a place that can provide the care that he needs. Having recently retired as an RN for 30 years, I was shocked how different it is to find placement for the Hospice patient in Hawaii vs a hospice patient in Oregon. Rose was very knowledgeable and familiar with the different facilities that are available for these patients as well as others. It really helps with her RN oncology background as well. She does the leg work and paper work so family members can focus their time on choosing the best facility for their family member and making it a smooth transition for all ( the receiving facility and the family and the client)

Elite Care Finders was a blessing to our family in our time of need. If it wasn’t for Rose, I don’t know what my family would have been able to do. Like many others leaving comments, Rose has provided exceptional service for our family. Before Rose came into our lives, my mother was dealing with several medical problems that needed 24 hour care. Our family was moving from hospital to hospital as my mother got treatment. Then, the reality of leaving the hospital, still needing 24 hour care, and then physical therapy, all started to overwhelm our family’s thoughts. “What can we do?” “Who do we call?” “How does all of this medical stuff work?” This has never happened to our family before and we felt lost. Rose stepped in with empathy and grace. She really took the time and effort to support our family and answered all of our questions. Believe me when I say, ALL of our questions… over texts & phone calls during different times of the day. Rose was there for our family day and night. Helping us find the caregiver that was the perfect fit. Everyone’s needs are different and that is where Rose will do her best to help you find the right fit for you and your family. 5 stars is not enough to rate the service our family received from Elite Care Finders and Rose. Her knowledge, professionalism, and empathy helps so many families connect with her network of caregivers that she personally reviews and recommends for you and your family specifically. Super service from our superhero… Thank you Rose for all you have done to help our family. Elite Care Finders is exactly what their name says…they found our elite care for our family.

Rose Gallego is an amazing person, who provided outstanding service in locating a foster home for my long time friend. He had been at Pohai Nani for several years and his condition deteriorated rapidly and needed 24 hour care. We searched for weeks and everyplace we contacted was full. Then someone recommended Rose, Elite Care Finder. Within one week she had found three places with vacancies for us to visit. Once we selected the home, Rose oversaw the entire process; insuring all medical documents and test were completed and finalizing all paperwork. My friend is now in a great place.

Rose's mission is to find the right placement for your loved one. She takes time to explain the process and provide you with the information you need to make those decisions. Elite CareFinders is really the gold standard in assisting you to find a care home that is focus on quality of long term care. She is compassionate and understands the process as she also has a loved one who needs long term care. She is a nurse and is able to do quality clinical assessment of the patient to match their needs and complete a thorough inspection of the homes to confirm they meet her high standards. She is passionate about her work and has a heart for the patient and their family.
I interviewed over 10 caregivers and their homes before finding Elite Care Finders. Rose listened to what was needed for my mother and because she knows the caregivers and inspected their home, she is able with confidence to refer to someone to me. The homes that she recommended was a big improvement than what the other company offered. I would highly recommend Elite Care Finders.

Rose RN of Elite Care Finders helped me find a care home for my brother. Living out of state, Rose’s help was immeasurable. She offered 2 choices, both were very suitable. Her help in setting up the transfer and her visiting my brother, the evening of the transfer, were most comforting to me knowing, with her help, I feel I made the correct decision. She delivered welcome gifts to my brother and the caregiver which added a nice and caring touch. Rose gets a 10 in my book! Jane

Rose took a calm and positive approach to overcome and solve the challenges of a highly emotional and difficult situation . I was put at ease because of her vast knowledge and experience with elder care. Her constant calmness gave me confidence to make a sound decision in placing my Father with a higher level of care.
She kept searching and used her resources to find and perfectly match my Father with a wonderful care home run by experienced care givers
We are all grateful. Thank you!

Rose was excellent from first our inquiry phone call. She guided us throughout the entire process easily and efficiently.. Today my sister is getting settled in and has expressed gratefulness for being where she is.

We can't thank Rose and her associates enough for the assistance in finding immediate skilled care for our 82 year old mother who had an unexpected fall, which resulted in a severe head injury. We live in Florida and have family there on Oahu. Keeping everyone in the loop and passing on information was critical for our situation. Rose was detailed, diligent and assertive communicating with us, the hospital , the doctors, and the care home mom went to. She kept us all in the loop so we all could make informed decisions together as a family. Rose is continuing this level of free service by helping us now to find a more long term facility that has different levels of care to include memory care, because mom is an Alzheimer's patient too. Rose's services are personalized to fit both the client & families needs. She is very experienced in her field, along with her knowledge of elder care and facilities, proved to be extremely valuable to our family in our time of need. You don't have to attempt this alone! If you need help, call Rose today!

Our family feels so fortunate to have been referred to Rose at Elite CareFinders. She personally interviews caregivers and ensures their homes are up to standard. We visited five homes on her recommendation and were impressed with all of them. Because Rose has relationships with doctors, nurses, hospitals, and social workers, we were able to place our Mom faster than expected. It was also helpful to have her take care of most of the paperwork. We were most impressed with how hands-on Rose has been through the whole process. From in-person to Zoom meetings, her compassion has shown through. The welcome baskets that she provided to our Mom, caregiver, and our family were so thoughtful! We highly recommend Rose at Elite CareFinders. She's not only very competent, but a genuinely good person.

You’re the best Rose! You’re expertise is not only helping the Kupunas finding the best home and fit caregiver for them but also advocating caregivers like me. Thank you so much, I learned a lot from you. Instead of focusing on the competition, you’ve been focusing on the beneficial of both clients and caregivers. You’re genuine, remarkable and worth connecting with. Thank you❤️

I am just so so thankful for Rose. She went beyond helping and felt blessed to meet her. She has so much energy and grace. I couldn’t have asked for in fact I haven’t come across someone this caring and so attentive and I have been with other care finders. I certainly will push (recommend) others to call her. Forever grateful.

Rose went above and beyond the call, multiple times, to assist my family with getting my dad into a foster home. It was also done on very short notice, which was both impressive and efficient.
On the day of dad's move in, she showed up to the foster home with lei, flowers, and food from Zippy's. Yet another example of Elite CareFinders going above and beyond the call.

A belated mahalo and much appreciation to Rose for helping us find the perfect care home for my mom in law. After our many unsuccessful searches for a good match for Mom’s needs, we were referred to Rose. What a blessing! Rose is so knowledgeable , caring and efficient. She coordinated the details and helped us find a wonderful licensed care home for mom. Rose even gifted Mom with a small welcoming gift on mom’s first day. Such a thoughtful gesture. Our family highly recommend Rose and Elite Care Finders.

After (frustratingly) working with bigger senior advisory services, I was blessed to connect with Elite CareFinders. Rose took the time to ensure my loved one was placed with the right caregiver. She personally took the time to learn about my loved one, myself, and the vetting of potential caregivers. Every step was top-notch. Rose was personally involved in every step of the process. Caring, professional and personable. I highly recommend Elite CareFinders.

Elite Care finders made everything so easy and less stressful. Rose was compassionate, and took the time to explain the differences in care homes and the level of care they are certified for. This was all new to me and my family. But with her assistance, we were able to find a lovely place for my mom. The quality of homes that Rose personally screens, exceeded my expectations. After having screened a few homes on my own, it was like night and day. Using Elite Care Finders was the best decision we made. My mom is now receiving the best care possible through a home they helped us find and within budget. We have seen a tremendous change in her. I highly recommend Elite Care finders. Start with them and save yourself the stress. Rose is so experienced, and thorough....and the nicest person.

The beginning of February I wanted to relocate my husband with dementia/alzheimer and behavior problems from his former care home to another care home. My goal was for him to be in a new care home by March 1st. I was told no one will take him and I couldn’t do it in such a short time. I tried a social worker to help me, he was no help. I frantically looked on the internet to find a place for him, I was told either they had no opening or my husband needed a smaller facility with special care. I didn’t know there was different type of care home for different needs. How can I find a home for him in less than two weeks. I prayed to the Lord for help because time was running out and I felt my back was against the wall. What if I cannot find a care home for him, what do I do, I cannot care for him. Around February 20th, I was told to call Rose, she can help me. Desperate I called Rose, my "Knight in Shining Armor" (an angel on earth). Rose assured me my husband will be at a new care home by March 1st. Rose is so knowledgeable about the different care homes and case managers, she gave me homes to visit, I found one on February 24th, Rose did all the paper work and on March 1st, my husband was in a new care home. Rose is amazing, I believe the Lord brought Rose into my life when I had nowhere to turn. Rose told me the day I called her, my husbands new caregiver called to tell her she have an opening. God Bless You, Rose. Thank you for all your hard work in helping me. Diane

After my aunt's assisting living facility unexpectedly informed me they could no longer provide care, I had one week to find a new placement. I contacted Elite CareFinders and spoke with Rose. I explained my aunt's situation, and she immediately started the search for an appropriate placement. The short time frame was challenging, but Rose made it work. She quickly found an excellent adult residential care home and successfully expedited the process. I'm not sure what I would have done without her help. Rose was patient, very communicative, and walked me through all the steps. I highly recommend Elite CareFinders.

I don’t know what I would have done without Rose’s help in finding a care home for my husband . She is extremely knowledgeable and efficient in cutting through all the paperwork and contacts needed in finding the right home. I didn’t know where to start and Rose cut through all the resources and found us a good home in less than 2 weeks. I am extremely grateful for all of Rose’s help support and hard work. She is wonderful.

A warm aloha to Rose Gallego who had expertly and professionally assisted me with finding the best care home for my mother. She handled every aspect of the search and selection of a home including the transfer and health forms. Most of all, Rose is not only a caring professional she is a genuinely compassionate person. She is a detailed person who sincerely wants a perfect match. “Going beyond to find the care your loved one deserves” is truly what she does! Mahalo nui loa🌺

Rose is absolutely incredible. I could always trust Rose to have my back.
As far as placement goes, she’s your expert. And she knows paperwork related requirements off the top of her head like no one I’ve come across. She’s definitely not in the industry for the money or she’d be a billionaire. She takes so much of her unpaid time to take care of even service providers she works with. She takes pictures for care homes to ensure they highlight little details about their home that make it special. She educates caregivers on industry best practices and isn’t afraid to speak her mind in a collaborative manner when she sees something below standard of care or could be improved. And helps to find a plan of implementation.
When work was less busy we would go on for hours on our own time brainstorming together how we could work together in offering a higher level of care and quality of life for our seniors. She is honest. When you ask her something whether the answer is good or bad, you’ll get a straightforward answer and solutions and optimistic outlook that never fails to shine.
Rose goes above and beyond and the name Elite is truly reserved for Rose. She will advocate and fight for her clients best interests. I’ve seen it through multiple clients we served alongside each other.
As long as I’ve known her, she is always looking to learn more about every corner of her industry and every aspect her families may need and then some more.
I love Rose and her incredible personality and Elite standard work ethic and I’m sure you all will too.

Rose Gallego with her incredible personality and compassion goes above and beyond the standard work ethics of other senior care agencies. She goes out of her way to ensure a higher level of care is afforded to her clients. My Mom is living proof of her tireless search for an appropriate care home. Rose communicates her wealth of knowledge in a way that is meaningful and understandable by the family. She sympathize/ empathize with the family which relieves anxiety and stress. Her follow-ups with the family after placement of their love one shows just how much she cares about the quality of life for her clients. Rose is heaven sent and a blessing to me and my family. Rose is efficient and amazing. Our family will forever be grateful for her exceptional and professional service.

We are forever grateful to Rose from Elite Carefinders for patiently and expertly guiding us in our quest for the right foster home for our dad. We certainly could never have done this ourselves! Because of her, our dad was placed in a lovely home, being cared for by a competent and compassionate caregiver, and being surrounded by a loving family. Placing our 90-year-old dad in a foster home was an emotional decision as well as a rigorous journey for our family. We have heard of residents being moved from a care/foster home to another because it was not the “right fit” or at worst, it was “horrible” experience to both the residents and their families. The health team referred us to contact Rose at Elite Carefinders which proved to be a great experience for our family. It was reassuring to know that Rose, being an RN by profession understood our dad’s level of care. She came for a home visit not only to meet my dad but also to do a thorough assessment of his care needs as well as our family’s expectations, she took the time to get to know our family, actively listened to our needs, concerns and what are the most important things we are looking for in a foster home. Her warmth and sincerity as well as her impressive knowledge about regulations and quality care further reassured us that Rose was the perfect person to help us find the “home away from home” for our dad. Rose worked tirelessly, visiting possible foster homes even on weekends. After personally screening the homes to make sure these are up to standard, she would send me pictures and all the important details. She never hesitated to take the opportunities to educate the caregiver/owner how to make their home environment better and safer. Rose patiently answered all my questions until I was satisfied, always encouraging me to be honest and “not settle”. When I was losing hope, she worked even harder and creatively negotiated a win-win agreement with the caregiver who turned out to be the “right fit” for our dad. Her foresight made this great outcome possible and we can’t thank her enough. Rose was there for our family right from the start, she was there with us during the big day of moving dad to the foster home bearing welcome gifts! And she was still there for us after the move, providing follow-up and support, reassuring us with kind words and offer of further help as needed. Rose is truly an exceptional advocate! Her passion for her work and compassion towards families searching for the right care/foster homes for their loved ones are qualities that truly serve our unique community here in Hawaii. Her goal for success to find the right home the first time sets her apart from others.

Rose is very personable and very professional. We were in a crunch to find a care home for my mother. She requires a higher level of care. The care home that I picked is wonderful. Rose held my hand every step of the way. She did all of the paperwork. On the day of admission, she showed up with gifts. Rose has continued to follow up with me to be sure that mom's transitioning OK.

There are no words to truly express how grateful we are to Rose at Elite CareFinders. From the beginning when I first spoke to her on the phone, I could tell she was a very special person and I immediately knew she was the one I wanted to work with in helping find a home for mom. I originally contacted a different agency for assistance but did not feel the same level of compassion, dedication, professionalism and positivity as Rose.
She has a wealth of knowledge and experience in the field and provided us with a step by step guidance throughout the process. Rose went above and beyond in providing excellent customer service. Within 2 days, she provided a list of potential care homes and within a week was able to find a good fit for mom. She even was there for the move in to make sure everything went smoothly.
Thank you Rose for everything!!! You are truly a gem and I would highly recommend you to anyone who is looking for excellent service and expertise!

DON’T WAIT ANY LONGER! I had been caring for my husband with Alzheimer’s for more than five years and it finally was affecting my physical health and mental wellbeing. I am so happy that I was referred to Elite Carefinders and was expertly and kindly helped by Rose Gallego. She is a master of finding the right place for your loved one and budget. Knowing too well the stress of caring for someone with dementia and the toll it takes on the caregiver, I again urge you to contact Rose!

"My father has Alzheimer's/dementia, and I recently had to place him in a care home. This decision was incredibly difficult but ultimately necessary, as we were unable to provide the level of care he needed. His current situation placed his health at risk, and we felt compelled to make the move, but we were unsure where to begin or whom to contact.
My niece took to Google, and that's when we discovered Elite CareFinders. We left a message and crossed our fingers, hoping for a response. Soon enough, the phone rang, and on the other end was Rose. She enlightened us about her services and provided invaluable information about senior care that we had not known. Rose assured us that she would search for quality care homes and get back to us – which she promptly did.
Before we knew it, we were on our way to visit our first care home and meet with the caregiver. Armed with the information Rose had given us, we felt more confident in our search and understanding of what to look for. Though we hadn't met Rose in person at this point, she tirelessly worked day and night to help us. She moved mountains for people she didn't even know, pouring her heart into our search.
Finally, we met Rose in person, and it was wonderful to put a face to the angel who had gone above and beyond for us. Life is never without its challenges, and we encountered a few along the way. However, Rose remained unwavering in her determination and ensured that we didn't lose hope.
Rose accompanied us to three care homes - one of which was a potential care home for my dad. After meeting with them and discussing the details, we realized that this was the right fit. Not only were the caregivers willing to make it affordable, but they also promised to provide a forever home for my dad, all thanks to Rose and her company.
We believe that God guided us to Rose because she possesses a humble and beautiful soul. My family and I will forever be grateful for her kindness and dedication. People like Rose, and the work she does, often go unnoticed. I want to share with the world what an incredible person she is and let everyone know that she's here to help.

Finding a Care home for my mother 93 yrs old and with Dementia Alzheimer’s disease has been very hard. Several care homes (4) have let her go because of her level of agitation and unable to adapt to new environments. The constant moving/visiting different care homes was tasking and frustrating.
With Elite Carfinders - Rose Gallego assist, we've been able to find a Care Home that's able/willing to address her care needs and handle her behavior issues. Every day is different. The selected care home has provided the care support, patience, safety, understanding my mom needs and addressed my family's concerns.
Rose Gallego: Mahalo for your time and assistance. Not only understanding my mom's needs (Dementia Alzheimer’s disease) but all the follow up support.

Finding a place that has an opening is a small part in a very large, complicated puzzle when it comes to moving your loved one into a new care setting. Medicaid? Adult community foster care home? Care home? Skilled Nursing? Residential Care home? Where to begin?!
I trust Rose when it comes to finding the right fit in the right setting for a client. There is SO MUCH MORE involved than finding a place that has an open bed. How much experience does the caregiver have? Do they have the right staffing available to provide safe, appropriate care? Have they taken care of complex or difficult clients before? Do they CARE about the clients that they serve? Are they licensed appropriately? Do they have a lot of complaints? Has the Department of Health cited them lately?
Moving a loved one is a very stressful experience, and it takes A LOT of expertise to do it right the first time. Especially with clients that have dementia.
I trust Rose to do a the right thing and would trust her to place my loved one. She takes the process seriously and is even more thorough than I am. She has a more extensive network of care providers than any of the other agencies in this field.
For Rose, its not just a job, its a calling. She is very good at what she does. Trust Rose to do it right - I would!!!
Mike Meyer, certified RN Case Manager - Oahu.

Rose was recommended to us by our hospital systems’ social worker . Rose’s medical background, attention to detail, care and energy helped our family through an extremely difficult time. Rose’s knowledge of the care home owners and their capabilities allowed her to find the perfect setting for my mom. I cannot express how grateful we are for her help.

Appreciate Rose immensely. She was caring and took the time to listen to me and my requests for my mother and helped guide me through all the difficulties getting medical records and being our advocate. Mom is now in a safe place where she (and I) can feel comfortable. Again thank you so much Rose 🫶
Rose was so supportive and attentive to my dad’s needs. We really appreciated her guidance.

Our experience with Rose was exceptional. During a stressful time she took all the time we needed to educate us about options and arrange and attend tours with us. Her experience and expertise is matched by her compassion. I highly recommend her and her services.

Rose helped our family find two good Care Homes for my cousin and her husband in a very short period of time. She takes time to understand clients needs; her network of Care Homes provides us with choices and she coordinated the admissions process. Her attention to details is exceptional; she communicates effectively and timely. Our family is very appreciative for the help Rose provided us in our time of kupuna care needs. I will definite use her services again and recommend Elite CareFinders to family and friends.

We reached out to Rose at a particularly difficult time. Mom was wrongfully discharged by her nursing home before Christmas which sent the family to utter distress and chaos. Rose was kind, caring, patient, experienced, smart and resourceful. She guided us through this most difficult time and was compassionate and extremely helpful throughout. We are grateful for her being there for us and definitely recommend her service!

Finding a proper care home was immensely confusing. My mother was in an Assisted Living Facility when she fell and fractured her vertebra. Initially we looked at moving her directly from the first Home to a new facility. Rose worked quickly and efficiently and had 5 recommendations within 24 hrs...2 were very attractive but we stayed at her current facility for 7 months. By then it was obvious that the initial care home's memory unit was too institutionalized for my mother who became very depressed and regressed in that rigid environment. I reached out to Rose again and she immediately recommended 2 lovely facilities and our family chose Manoa Senior Care for its open, caring environment, homey feel with excellent staff. I am extremely pleased with the outcome. Rose was instrumental in finding the right place.

When our stepmother’s needs exceeded what could be provided at home, we knew it was time to find her a care home. But we didn’t know how to go about looking for one, and we were apprehensive about the process.
Rose took us under her wings and put her heart into finding the perfect care home. She went over and beyond -- explained things in detail and guided us, even assisted with the necessary requirements and documents.
Without hesitation, we recommend Rose to anyone who needs assistance with senior living placement. We are beyond grateful for everything she did for our family.

I needed to move my very sick 97 year old uncle into a care home with 24/7 care as soon as possible. Since I was unable to start an intensive search I simply asked the nurse at the facility and she suggested contacting Rose of Elite Carefinders. I was immediately and pleasantly surprised to talk to someone who was very helpful, straight forward and compassionate. She answered ALL my questions with honesty and shared information to help me find the right home for my uncle, NOT to just suggest her listing. She encouraged me to check out her referrals to see if it was a good "fit". She was able to give me a list of the care homes in the community I requested and even sent photos of what the living set up of each home looked like. She checked out these homes prior to my appointments to make sure they were safe, clean and accessbile and legit. I did find a very good home for my uncle quickly and am pleased that all the interviews between my uncle and care home providers went well. We chose one that was perfect and I am extremely grateful that Rose provided the extraordinary help to find a place for my uncle in a timely manner. Her kindness and patience are greatly appreciated during a very stressful time for my family. Mahalo.

I had to find a place for my 92 year old Mom who suffers from dementia and is bed bound. Rose (Elite Carefinder) reached out to me to offer their services in assisting me to find Mom a good home. Rose asked a few simple questions and within a couple of days had lined up a few foster care homes for me to visit. She sent me pictures of each so I knew beforehand what each place looked like. She made it so simple for us to make an appointment at each place for me to visit. She kept in touch with me daily until I made a decision on where to have Mom live. Rose understood what a difficult decision it was for me to move Mom to foster care and provided emotional support. I cannot thank her enough for her help in making this transition so smooth. She even showed up on move in day to welcome Mom to her new home. I highly recommend Elite Care Finders. I cannot imagine having to go through this alone.

Rose has an enormous contact base of hundreds of small to large care homes on Oahu and maybe other islands to find you the right fit for your family loved ones who need full care.
She was a delight to work with and found us a place for my sister who has Alzheimer’s in a matter of a few days giving us several choices from which to choose. She takes the task of you finding the right fit without the work and submits photos and details of each property by email or text for you to view and narrow down what fits your requirements.
A pleasure to work with.

My experience with Rose at Elite CareFinders were very impressive with her professionalism, experience, and how well and smoothly the transition from home life to assisted care living. Rose was a God send and very instrumental with achieving our goal in assisting my parents.

item.title: Marites Collado, Administrator Halawa Care Home (Care Provider)
item.dc:creator: rose

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Rose Gallego RN of Elite CareFinders is the best! As a care provider, it is imperative for us to trust our referral sources. Rose has provided us a high quality service that is unmatched! I appreciate that she is a Registered Nurse with clinical expertise. She goes beyond the average referral agencies by providing a concierge approach and takes time and due diligence to help me as a provider. She has so much empathy and grace to thoughtfully take great care of care providers like myself and equally for the families and clients she serves. For special referrals with detailed care needs, Rose accompanies the family to tour my home, accompanies me to interview the client in person, and even takes care of all the paperwork for us. She does this quickly and efficiently allowing us to move in a client in just a day!
Rose and Elite CareFinders has been extremely valuable for me as a care provider and love her services!❤️

Rose was instrumental in finding a care home for my mother. She spent time with my mom to get to know her condition and used her expertise in the care home industry to match my mom's needs to a care home that could provide the extra care my mom needed. Throughout this whole process Rose was the go-between the caregiver, the case manager and my family doing such things as setting up a site visitation, working with the case manager to get the necessary approvals, and especially encouraging us during this stressful time.
Without Rose it would have been very difficult for my family to find the appropriate care home for my mom. We would not hesitate to call on Rose for any future needs for my family.

We had a short time to move my father-in-law into a care facility. Rose understood this and within a few hours had a potential facility for us that met the requirements. We were able to visit the next day. Because Rose used to do compliance work, ensuring care facilities met standards, the facility she referred us to definitely met standards. Within three days, we were moving my father-in-law in. Rose communicated with us regularly during the process, took care of the voluminous paperwork requirements, and worked with the facility to ensure my father-in-law was signed up for regular home visits from doctors and nurses. She not only met but exceeded expectations. We highly recommend her services.

Working with Rose is delightful. She is a consummate professional, who is very easy to work with. She genuinely cares about the success of every interaction with the families she works with as well as the care providers. I appreciate the time she dedicates to everyone involved. She is very trust worthy, hard working and knowledgeable. 10/10.

Rose helped make a daunting process of finding a care home for our grandmother much easier. She was so professional and empathetic to our needs. She took the time to listen to us, meet with us at every home, and was sure to follow up. She cares and she understands! She asked questions during our visits to make sure all our needs were met. We are grateful for such caring and thoughtful service during such a difficult time!

Rose's professionalism, expertise and knowledge of the homes and their operators, as well as assessing what might be a good fit for my brother was clearly evident since we felt that he could have been placed in any of the three homes we visited. She turned, what to us was, a monumental and daunting task that would affect the rest of my brother's life into a smooth and expeditious placement. She lifted the greatest weight we were dealing with at a difficult time. She was a godsend who performed a miracle for our family. We will be forever grateful to her.

I was taxed with the overwhelming challenge of finding a facility to care for my elderly parents with complex medical needs. I had no idea where to start, what to look for, or what questions to ask. I just had a list of what I thought were unattainable wants and needs. By divine intervention, I was connected with Rose Gallego RN at Elite CareFinders. From our first conversation , I could tell Rose was special. She listened carefully to everything I said and asked the right questions to pinpoint the PERFECT facility for my parents. It was if she read my mind and materialized everything I was hoping to find. Rose facilitated contact and accompanied us on our site visits. She was instrumental in helping us to ask the right questions. Rose’s experience, dedication, and genuine care for our parent’s best interest was evident from start to completion. Our parents have settled into their new home and our family is at peace thanks to Rose. ”

Finding a home or facilty for a loved one is a daunting, depressing and stressful task. We looked at half a dozen places on the other side of the mountain. I called many facilities as well. The other side of the mountain has more care homes due to the population. However, we knew that if we secured one on the other side of the mountain, our loved one would be forgotten due to location. Well, I happen to click on a website home located minutes from us. Which led us to Rose. She called several times because she wanted to know our needs and preferences. She listened well. She knew we were almost committed to somewhere, but on the other side of the mountain. We had no papers signed yet. With one week ahead, for a June 1st move in, she called and had us visit a home 10 minutes away, and on our side of the mountain. This was a blessing. Rose was a Blessing! Rose helped us with paperwork that we didn't know about. She helped with the doctors to get our loved one in, on time. We are forever thankful to Rose at Elite Carefinders for her diligence and care for our family, while being yet a stranger to us, then. We are so grateful to have met Rose, with that one click. She is the "Total Package" and truly cares for the families that she is able to help. We are forever grateful. Mahalo, Joey and Teri

Rose Gallego RN of Elite CareFinders was referred to us by Kaiser ER ... God send. She did more than 100% and was quick, knowledgeable, effective and efficient. She exuded sincerity and passion in trying to work with my family to secure the best for my 93 year old father and my family consisting of a 91 year old mother my hubby and myself who are in our early and late 70's. Don't know what i would have done without her guidance, assistance, perseverance and humor in coordinating/directing us to Malama Ola Hospice Services and into a Foster Home within our means that could provide health and well being services for a large male patient 6 feet tall and 225lb. I would highly +++ recommend Rose.

Rose found a care home for my mother that exceeded our expectations. She was caring, responsive, and great to work with! Rose spent the time to understand our family’s needs. As a registered nurse, Rose was also able to assess my mother’s needs from a medical perspective. She provided several options and worked with our family to find the best long-term home for my mother. I was impressed with the excellent care home options that Rose presented as well as her expertise and insight. She enabled our family to quickly decide on a home that seemed to be the perfect fit for my mother. My mother was an avid gardener, and this home has a beautiful garden that my mother enjoys. The caregiver is also an RN who provides outstanding care and can work with my mother’s special medical needs. My family and I are eternally grateful to Rose. Her expertise and guidance were key to finding the right home for my mother.

We needed a miracle! My sister's state of health escalated to requiring immediate a care home or assisted living. However, we faced additional financial issues that makes an easy placement difficult. I called everywhere for help and was blessed to find Rose from Elite Carefinders. She listened with a compassionate heart and gave me a glimmer of hope by calling one person that would be the answer to prayers. Mildred Bumanglag of Waipahu opened her heart and my sister now resides in a home that provides her the exact care that she needs. After a few days, she writes, "Mildred and her family are great! They make me feel like one of the family." Sincere thank you, Rose! Your expertise, your compassion, your generosity, your follow through from beginning to end is beyond excellent! Mahalo nui loa!

From the very first conversation with Rose at Elite Carefinders her professionalism and positivity helped relieve our anxieties right away. She took the time to really listen and understand our concerns for my Dad. Her attention to details are exceptional she provided us with many options and really provided the guidance to find the right fit the first time . We had the very best experience because Rose communicated with us timely, effectively, and compassionately. It’s not just a job for Rose. It’s her passion, I think it’s her calling. She went above and beyond the average referral Agencies that I had encountered prior to finding her. My Dad is 99 years old and Rose was absolutely instrumental in finding him the perfect placement and making my dad feel welcomed and treated with sincere respect. My dad felt honored and grateful to Rose that helped him find the quality of life he is now enjoying! Truly an exceptional Advocate for the elderly. We definitely recommend Rose at Elite Carefinders to our family and friends.

I sincerely cannot begin to express just how instrumental Rose has been in helping me and my family find a wonderful home for my 99 year old dad! Rose was so helpful and caring as well as professionally informative by taking her time to explain everything to me so that I understood everything there was to know about choosing a Foster Home for my dad. Her sweet caring disposition was very welcoming and her generosity was beyond expectations! From the bottom of my heart we thank you Rose at Elite CareFinders for finally giving me peace of mind knowing that my dad is in good hands with the perfect Foster Home for his needs and ours! I would highly recommend Elite CareFinders to anyone who’s looking for assistance with finding a great caring home for their loved ones! Thank you so much Rose Gallego!

Recently, in September 2024, Elite Carefinders was recommended to me by my dad’s doctor’s social worker. I was looking for a carehome that would be closer to where my dad’s house is (and where we stay when we come back to Oahu). There were also some concerns with my dad’s mobility and how that was being addressed at his (now former) carehome.
Rose reached out to me and we communicated via phone, email, and text. She asked for my preferences and what I was looking for, for my dad. I gave her quite a list! Of course I knew that it was probably impossible to find a place that met all of my preferences and desires. But I was hopeful.
At first, it seemed that there might not be a “perfect” place, but a bed opened up at a carehome in the area I desired! Rose was on the phone with me and said she was going to do a FaceTime walkthrough for me. She was able to show me and my husband the carehome, and we also got a chance to speak with the owner. I then got on the plane the next day (from Colorado) to see the place in person.
Rose met up with me at the carehome, and after my touring the home, we sat with the owner and talked for quite awhile. The more I spoke with the owner, the more confident I felt about the place. I brought my dad by the next day and gave a formal acceptance to place dad there.
In the past, I had worked with a different referral agency. They were “ok,” and I was still quite stressed out with the process of finding a place. After working with Rose, I can confidently say that she is ABOVE AND BEYOND the rest. She provides true “CONCIERGE” service! She has a wealth of knowledge and will steer you in the right direction. One of her goals is to place a person in the RIGHT carehome the FIRST time. Rose has true care and compassion for those going through this finding-a-carehome process. She makes you feel comfortable and guides you through all the steps.
My dad is doing really well at his new carehome. The owners and workers are very caring and go above and beyond for their residents. From day 1, they had my dad up and walking with a walker (with standby assistance)! This is after the previous carehome had him mostly in a wheelchair for two months. The owner is really nice and will even help FaceTime me on dad’s phone everyday after his lunch! And he often sends me pics of his meals (and how much he has eaten!). They consider my dad and me family, and I feel the same about them!
I cannot thank you enough, Rose! You’re the best! Thank you also for all the sweet goodies and the “welcome” cake for dad! It made me and dad feel so special. For anyone looking for a referral agency, I highly recommend Rose from Elite Carefinders!!

Rose is the kindest and most knowledgeable person in her profession. She made our search for a home for mom so easy and stress-free. We are truly happy to have been working together with Rose, and are so grateful for her dedication towards helping our kupuna find their forever homes 😊

Working with Rose was riding on a magic carpet ride. We were able to find and admitted my ex spouse to an assisted living facility in one week. Rose is an extremely knowledgeable professional with a caring heart. She took away all my anxiety and stress and made it a positive experience.

Rose RN of Elite CareFinders is a godsend! With her assistance, we found a home to care for our loved one and settled all the things that needed to be done in record time. Amazing!!!👍. Thank you, Rose 🥰😊
Rose helped us find a suitable care home for our aunt with short notice. She provided different options for us to consider. She was professional and courteous. We are grateful for her assistance.

We were referred to Rose at Elite Carefinders and it was the biggest blessing for our family as we were searching for a new care home for my mom.
The initial call with Rose was easy and relaxed as she gathered information about my mom and her preferences to search for the best placement for her. Within days, she had multiple visits scheduled, was very communicative and helped walk our family through the process without feeling rushed or stressed. Once we found the fantastic new care home for mom, she helped with ensuring a smooth transition for mom along with an amazing “welcome” to your new home celebration for mom!
I know that we’ve found the perfect place for mom and we couldn’t have done it without Rose and Elite Carefinders! If anyone I know is need of assistance to find a care home for their loved ones, I’m definitely recommending Rose every single time.

Rose of Elite CareFinders has been extremely helpful in the entire process of placing my brother-in-law in a care home. Not only is she very knowledgeable in every aspect of placements, she is also very gracious and pleasant and a joy to be with. Excellent service!!

Please give Elite Care Finders a chance, you will not regret. They will find a place for you or your relative. I did for my spouse, and I was in stress mode and needed help fast. Rosie came through. Thank you, Rosie, you are a god send. Thank you. Respectfully, Ryan Namaka

Thank you Rose for helping me find a good care home for Mom! The process of finding care is stressful and complex but your expertise, hard work, and attention to detail made it less so. We were very fortunate to find your service. Thank you again.

We are so grateful to Rose. From the moment we made contact with her, we were impressed. She knew the right questions to ask, listened to our needs, and was able to provide us with options, all of which were very good. She quickly set up care home tour appointments and each of them checked all the boxes we requested. We were so relieved that she led us to find the perfect fit for our elderly family member with special needs.
Rose was always prompt in her responses, and thorough in guiding us through our search and even our move-in. She also checked in on our family member after move-in to see how the transition was going, taking the time to follow-up to ensure all needs were being met.
Her resourcefulness and expertise relieved us of the stress and time typically associated with this type of endeavor as she took care of absolutely every step of finding the right care home. Thank you Rose! You are a godsend.

Elite Carefinders and Rose Gallego were a huge help in finding my father the right independent living facility. Highly recommend her service for anyone looking for find the right place for their loved one!

Rose is great! She helped us every step of the way to find a foster home that would be a good fit for my mom. Like most people, we were totally lost and did not know what to do. Rose walked us through and helped us to navigate the process. Words cannot express how grateful we are for all of your help.

We had an excellent experience with Rose from start to finish and could not have done it without her.. She took the time out to get to know not only our mom but also the family and guided us throughout the entire process of our situation.
She has great knowledge of senior living and provider service options that would be available.. We would not have been able to find our mom a home on such short notice had it not been for her. Her expertise took so much stress off from us in trying to figure things out. She made sure to find homes that would be a good fit. Highly recommend her service in finding the perfect home for your loved one..

We are incredibly grateful to Rose for her amazing service in helping us find the perfect care home for our mom in such a short period of time. Her dedication, compassion, and efficiency made the entire process smooth and stress-free. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Thank you, Rose!

Rose is the very best person you can use to help you find a perfect place for your loved one. Rose really listens *I mean really listens to you, she heard the desperation in my voice and went to work quickly helping us find a place for mom. Rose took the time to help me after my mother was being bullied by the night shift at PCH. She worked into the night to help us, never complained about me calling and asking questions always willing to help. She even came to meet with my mother and me to try to assist us and help us. She shows kindness, compassion, and a genuine caring attitude to help you. Thank you so much Rose, it has been a very trying journey for me but with you by my side I was able to face all the obstacles and red tape without any more added stress. Rose is your lady when you need help and someone who will be on your side. Her name describes her well....Rose beautiful and strong!! There are no words to tell you how much she helped me. I would refer her to everyone who needs help, to all my friends and family. You can trust her!!!! Thank you Rose!!!!!"

Our family has worked with Rose twice in our search to find the perfect place for our brother. Both times Rose was very caring, attentive, and understanding of our and my brother's changing needs. We would highly recommend Rose's services to anyone looking for the perfect environment for a loved one. Thank you, Rose!!

Elite Carefinders is the perfect way to describe the services that Rose provides. You can trust that Rose will help you to wade through the numerous tough descisions to help provide the best care for your loved ones. She really cares!

Rose was extremely caring, urgent, and deliberate when assisting with care home needs in such a short period of time. In addition, she is very well educated in this area and explains everything that just makes things easy to understand. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend her!

A big mahalo to Rose for exceptional service placing my father into a foster home. She not only listened, but understood my father’s needs and wants, and our concerns about his challenging behavior. Rose’s health care and care management background, and familiar knowledge of foster homes and their caregivers (personality, background, care style) enabled her to find the right place for my father. Her placement approach made all the difference in the world: allowing my father to get to know the foster home caregivers prior to placement, seeking his approval, and providing a welcoming move-in. It made my father feel like he was in control. Rose ‘s support exceeded our expectations. She was there every step of the way, even providing my father with a welcome gift, encouragement, and follow-up visits. My father has been in several care homes placed by other agencies with unsuccessful results. This time he is very happy. Rose is passionate about matching caregivers and seniors for best fit results and genuinely cares for those she supports.

I enjoyed working with Rose. She is very professional and a great communicator. Rose's background in nursing, case management and administrative work provided her to build Elite Care Finders to an exceptional business. Her care, empathy and compassion to find a suitable home for your loved one is priority. Rose, also makes you feel like family, because she cares. Mahalo, Rose for your assistance.

Rose was soooo very helpful in helping me find a quality memory care home for my husband. I found her to be very professional, caring, responsive, compassionate, and attentive to matching him up with a home that would meet his particular needs. I cannot recommend Rose and her business, Elite Caregivers, enough. She walked me step-by-step through the process of getting him into the selected home during this life-changing, emotional transition. Rose, I don't know that I could have done it without you!!

I have great experiences working with Ms Rose she handles all the paperwork so families don’t need to. She makes sure the families have much less stress during the process of finding the perfect match! Would recommend!

I enjoy working with Rose so much! She takes all of the stress out of finding the perfect placement for families. What I like most about Rose is she takes the time to make sure all the homes in her network meet a very high standard of hygiene and presentation for the residents.
Very important. And her background in the medical field is also what I like about her that she can apply her RN degree to ensure the standard of the homes are hygienic and safe. Not many referral agencies I came across has someone who puts as much care into what they do as Rose.
I look forward to working with her again!

It’s been a pleasant experience working with you. I appreciate your dedication and time for finding me a perfect client to work with. Thank you very much Rose for the opportunity you have given me, matching me with a perfect client and amazing family. Much appreciated for your help and support!

So many families are faced with the overwhelming task of finding the right care home for a loved one—often under urgent circumstances. Rose from Elite CareFinders was an incredible support during this challenging time. She helped ease our stress by finding forever homes for both my aunt and her blind brother. With her extensive experience in the industry, Rose conducted a thorough assessment of their needs and carefully matched them with homes that are safe and caring. She also took the time to walk us through the entire process, explaining the important details and considerations that we would have otherwise overlooked. Our family is truly grateful for Rose’s compassion, professionalism, and dedication.

Super pleased with Elite Care Finder Rose and her quickness on finding a good Carehome for my mother. Rose made sure she went first to check on the Carehome first before allowing me to interview and meet the Carehome of my choice. It took 1 day of touring to make my decision. Rose was so compassionate to my mother's needs and I know without Elite Care Finder Rose's help, I could not have found a good home for my mother. I'm so grateful and I am stress free now that mom is in a happy place.

We were very pleased from the start of how efficient Rose was in the process of helping us find a home for our Mom. She made it easy in guiding us through this difficult process. We would highly recommend anyone needing this type of assistance. Rose was there every step of the way and genuinely cared for everyone's feelings throughout the process.

Rose Gallego is super professional with wealth of knowledge (5 stars or more). She showed me 2 care homes & I liked both homes. We're currently working to get approval & she continues to provide good advice. I highly recommend Rose & services she provides.

We would highly recommend Elite Carefinders to anyone who is trying to find the best placement for a loved one or friend. Working with Rose was wonderful as she is very knowledgeable about all levels of services available. She responded quickly and patiently answered questions and alleviated our concerns. We genuinely felt cared for throughout the process.

I was blown away by the level of professionalism,knowledgeable and expertise by this company (Elite Care finders) They went above and beyond to ensure my satisfaction and especially the families of the clients.Working with the (Owner) Rose has streamlined our processes and boosted productivity.Their communication is always clear and transparent. I’m so grateful working with Elite Care finders (Rose ) the Owner.

We are so grateful to Rose of Elite Carefinders for her exceptional support in helping us find the right home for our mom. From the very beginning, Rose was incredibly responsive and attentive—always available to answer questions, offer guidance, and provide reassurance during what could have been an overwhelming process.
Her diligence and genuine care stood out every step of the way. She took the time to truly understand our mom’s needs and preferences, and her deep knowledge of the options available made all the difference. Thanks to Rose, we found the perfect place where our mom can comfortably age in place, surrounded by the right level of care and a supportive environment.
We highly recommend Rose and Elite Carefinders to any family looking for thoughtful, personalized help in navigating senior care. She made a challenging time so much easier, and we are deeply appreciative.
Rose was incredibly helpful and quick in assisting me to find a home appropriate for my dad. She was very responsive to all my questions, concerns, and phone calls. I highly recommend her services!

Rose Gallego, Elite Carefinders, has been a true professional in providing advice and showing us care homes for my 88 year old spouse. Showed us 2 great homes & he is now in one of those homes. Rose is a true gem & is a highly recomnended Advisor who's so helpful. Thanks, Rose.

Rose was a wonderful resource to find a carehome for our mother who suffered a traumatic brain injury after a fall. She provided invaluable information which helped us navigate the challenges of rehab, medicare appeals, and finally connecting us with a caring, safe and nurturing caregiver. I would highly recommended using Rose's services to any family in this difficult situation

Rose got right on it and set me up with three possible placements for my sister, who is a Alzheimer's patient, for these She was very professional and VERY helpful. I would encourage those looking for help finding services for their loved ones to consider Rose. She is great!
Rose is a caring individual that understands the clients needs and shares what the caretaker provides. Thank you for a great referral.

Rose did a wonderful job of helping us find a place for my mother. She went above and beyond in getting my mom into a place that truly fit her needs. We are truly grateful for her patience and kindness she extended to us during this stressful time. I highly recommend her services.

Rose by far is the best agent i have come across in terms of finding a care home for my parents. She is caring, selfless and professional. She listens to the need of our family and diligently look for the right place that will fit our needs. She is very experienced but she never makes you feel pressured. She went extra mile to help me call and submit an appeal for my dad to extend his stay at an AL facility. She didn’t have to do it for me. I am truly grateful for all the support and help she offered. Also, it has been a year since she found a foster home for my mom. We are truly blessed by this foster home and my mom loves the care giver there. God is good.

Thank you, Rose, for helping us to navigate the elder long term care system which could have been a daunting experience. You had established a broad based community knowledge and demonstrated professional skills accessing prompt communication links with appropriate caregivers for our loved one. Within days a foster home was matched to what we were looking for: a family centered home with a skilled caregiver and, with an unexpected addition, of extended family members who are also trained and skilled. The primary caregiver is a sweet caring humble person who showed much compassion and gave a warmhearted welcome to her home and family. Thank you so much, Rose, for your generosity, kindness, empathy and support. You walked us through a difficult transition in our lives and yet we learned there was a positive way to see our loved one find a place that gave peace and restful days ahead. Thanks again. Susan F.

Rose is #1 when it comes to providing the best service in helping me find the best place in providing care for my loved one. I am deeply grateful and blessed to have her helping and guiding me through life's journey as a caregiver. Elite Carefinders . .Care with Aloha!

As a primary care physician, Rose and Elite Carefinders have always been my “go-to” for those patients and their families who desire a starting point to finding excellent, and medically appropriate, and compassionate long-term care. Healthcare extends far beyond your doctors, and it really does “take a village” to adequately care for our kupuna, as well as their care support team. Rose developed Elite Carefinders with a clear and passionate vision to help our kupuna more easily find appropriate long-term care within the Oahu community. Since then, Rose and Elite Carefinders have successfully empowered kupuna, their families and caregivers by providing the “premier” in care-finding service, complete with a first-of-its-kind, easy-to-use, well-designed website! They have even recently expanded to Hawaii island! My highest professional recommendation goes out to Rose and Elite Carefinders! Mahalo to you and your team for providing this unique and timely service for our island kupuna. Transitioning to a care facility is always a tense time, but Rose and Elite Carefinders have been able help a number of kupuna and their families navigate and land in the best care situation possible, supporting them through the entire process, all with the “elite” touch. Check out her website and please don’t hesitate to contact Rose for a free consultation!
I'm so glad we got you(Rose) through a referral from my girlfriend for her mom's care. Your recommendations gave us a very informative perspective in order to make a decision of care for my mother.

Rose is a godsend! From the very start her enthusiasm to help families in need to connect them with potential caregivers was not only efficient but incredibly fast. Her relentless and tenacious work ethic along with her compassionate caring attitude made working with her a great and memorable experience. We can never thank her enough for helping us. She is definitely the person who works tirelessly for the families.

We were blessed to be referred to Rose of Elite Carefinders. She has a vast experience in nursing, to challenges in healthcare, care home placement & it process. After an interview, Rose focused on my mother’s needs plus our special requests and with good timing she provided us with 2 good care homes to choose from. The transition for my mother and our family was stress free and a smooth one. After settling into her new care home, Rose visited my mom to assure that everything was in place. It’s been 5 months and my mom adores her caregivers. Thank you so much Rose. We appreciated all your efforts, great customer service, innovative ideas & being resident focused.

I am so very grateful to Rose. My husband and I were going on a trip, and the respite care home we normally put my mother in law was full. I reached out to Rose and she came thru for us. We only had a couple weeks and Rose came thru for us. She is a god send. We will be using Rose from now on

Rose at Elite CareFinder was such a comfort in a very difficult time regarding my mother. She was so very informed, compassionate, and ready to serve. If there’s anyone who is answering her call to live and love well with purpose in this life, that would be Rose. She is the go-to person for senior care needs on the islands.

Rose was an absolute life saver when I suddenly needed help from in home support to a caring residence for my aunt after she fell. She made mountains move and the stars align in a matter of days. Took desperate calls from me to answer questions and calm my worries. She kept me grounded and reassured that things would work out and she would be there with me every step of the way. She is very knowledgeable and above all, caring (even when she didn’t even meet me in person). Her experience is incredible and she is prepared to set-up Plan A, B, C, D,…..and so on. I am so grateful that Rose offers this amazing support and service. She’s helped so many families and clients! I can’t express how much her help meant in that critical time.

I've had the privilege of working with Rose at Elite Care Finders as both a client and a provider and I can attest she is consistent and stellar on both ends. As a client, Rose went above and beyond to help place my loved one in the right care setting: from narrowing down options to those that matched my criteria, doing site visits, all the way up to following up after the admission to make sure all things went smoothly. She knows her providers well and she gets to know her clients even better. As a provider, this is impressive because it makes me confident she will recommend the home that she thinks will meet the needs of her client the best, and not simply for what she think will be an easy placement. Highly recommend Rose if you're looking for someone to help you navigate the sometimes overwhelming and challenging task of finding the right home for your loved one. Rose's breadth of experience in the healthcare / long term care industry is not wasted as she applies every thing she has learned to best serve her clients and providers.
